# 🚀 Visual Guide: How to Access Your AI Prompts

## ✨ Your Prompts Are Now Easy to Find!

I've set up **2 easy ways** to access your planning and debugging prompts in VS Code.

---

## 🎯 Method 1: Prompt Picker (Easiest!)

Press **`Alt+/`** (or `Alt+Windows+/`) anywhere in VS Code

This opens a **dropdown menu** showing all your available prompts:

- Plan Feature - Feature planning and architecture
- Systematic Debugging - Troubleshoot issues efficiently
- Code Review - Pre-commit quality checks
- UI Consistency - Design system guidelines

**Steps:**

1. Press `Alt+/`
2. You'll see a searchable list of your `.prompt.md` files
3. Click one or type to filter
4. Press Enter to load the prompt

The prompt will open in a new chat window with all the guidelines loaded!

---

## 🔍 Method 2: Prompt Picker Dropdown

**Keyboard Shortcut**: `Alt+Windows+/` (or `Alt+/`)

This opens a searchable dropdown menu showing ALL your prompt files:

1. Press `Alt+Windows+/`
2. See the list of available prompts
3. Type to search (e.g., "plan", "debug")
4. Click or press Enter to load

**Alternative**: Command Palette → "Chat: Run Prompt..."

---

## 💬 Method 3: Hashtags in Chat

Type these anywhere in Copilot Chat:

| Hashtag     | Loads                 |
| ----------- | --------------------- |
| `#plan`     | Planning prompt       |
| `#debug`    | Debugging prompt      |
| `#review`   | Code review prompt    |
| `#ui`       | UI consistency prompt |
| `#workflow` | Workflow prompt       |

---

## 📂 Your Prompt Files Location

All prompts are stored here (if you need to edit them):

```
.vscode/prompts/
  ├── planning.prompt.md
  ├── debugging.prompt.md
  ├── code-review.prompt.md
  ├── ui-consistency.prompt.md
  └── workflow.prompt.md
```

---

## 🎨 Visual Summary

**Starting a new chat?**
→ Look at the welcome screen, click a recommended prompt

**Already in a chat?**
→ Press `Alt+/` to see the dropdown, or type `#plan`

**Can't remember?**
→ Open this file: `.vscode/VISUAL_GUIDE.md` (you're reading it!)

---

## 🔄 After VS Code Restart

1. **Reload Window**: `Ctrl+Shift+P` → "Reload Window"
2. Open new Copilot Chat
3. See your prompts on the welcome screen!

---

## 💡 Pro Tips

- **Pin this file**: Right-click tab → "Pin" so you can always reference it
- **Bookmark prompts folder**: Click star icon in Explorer for `.vscode/prompts/`
- **Keyboard shortcut**: `Alt+/` becomes muscle memory fast!

---

- **Full setup guide**: `.vscode/PLANNING_MODE_SETUP.md`
- **Quick reference**: `.vscode/QUICK_REFERENCE.md`
- **Edit prompts**: Open any `.prompt.md` file and customize!

---

**Remember**: `Alt+/` = instant prompt picker! 🎉
